shortDescription: Elegant 5-bedroom detached family home in Davisville with a wraparound porch and updated interior.
fullDescription: Welcome to 62 Hillsdale Avenue East in the vibrant Davisville neighbourhood. This beautifully presented detached home offers generous living space across multiple levels. The main living area boasts an open-concept design with pot lights and a cosy gas fireplace. The kitchen has been fully renovated with soft-close cabinetry, stone counters, and a breakfast bar. The 5 bedrooms are well-proportioned, with the primary suite featuring a walk-in closet and updated ensuite. The deep lot provides ample space for gardening, play, or future expansion. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Chef’s kitchen with granite countertops and premium appliances
